description_long: This is a classic banker’s lamp featuring a polished brass base and a curved green glass shade. The lamp has a sturdy, round base with a stepped design, supporting a vertical stem that connects to the shade via two decorative brass arms. The green glass shade is semi-cylindrical with a marbled texture, providing a vintage aesthetic. A small pull chain hangs from one side, serving as the lamp’s switch. The lamp’s overall design is both functional and ornamental, with smooth metallic surfaces and a glossy finish on the glass. This style is commonly found on desks in libraries, offices, or study areas.
description: A vintage banker’s lamp with a brass base and a curved green glass shade, featuring a pull chain switch and ornate detailing.
description_view_0: Side view showing the curved green glass shade and the brass arm structure supporting it.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the full width of the green glass shade and the central pull chain.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the curved shade and brass support, with the pull chain less visible.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back of the green glass shade and the symmetrical brass arms.
